retry_reason: Put operations are never retried; after the put, the object may be freed and use-after-free would result from a retry.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the references held by the addr_map_symbol on its internal map and thread resources. It unconditionally calls map_symbol__exit, which decrements the refcount of both the map and the thread (via the original thread pointer). After this call, the addr_map_symbol object is considered invalid and must not be accessed further; the caller must not call any get/put functions on it. There is no return value and no failure condition; the operation always succeeds.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to call map_symbol__exit, which is a put function that decrements refcounts on both thread and map members. No other logic is present.
